RegLoan Bank — Form W-2 Wage and Tax Statement Document W2-0002 Page 1 of 1 Employee: Carlos Brown SSN: [REDACTED] Box Description Amount ($) 1 Wages, tips, other comp. 132,046 2 Federal income tax withheld 24,157 3 Social security wages 90,233 4 Social security tax withheld 6,753 5 Medicare wages and tips 128,633 6 Medicare tax withheld 1,217
